SOURCE: 17111768.pdf
IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (17111768.pdf)
SUMMARY: Experienced DISA Project Manager with a strong background in IT and project support for various agencies including DCMA, DMDC, OPM, and DFAS. Skilled in managing project scope, coordinating with IA personnel, and ensuring compliance with DIACAP.
SKILLS: Project Management, IT Support, Disaster Recovery Planning, IA Coordination, DIACAP Compliance, Technical Analysis, Customer Service, Leadership, Communication, Resource Management

SOURCE: 17111768.pdf
JOB TITLE: DISA Project Manager
COMPANY: Department of Defense
DATES: January 2010 - January 2014
DESCRIPTION: Provided IT and project support for the Federal Data Center Consolidation Initiative, managing projects for DCMA, DMDC, OPM, and DFAS. Developed project work plans, coordinated with IA personnel, and ensured compliance with DIACAP.

SOURCE: 17111768.pdf
JOB TITLE: Computer Technician Specialist
COMPANY: Navy/Marine Corps Intranet Project
DATES: August 2009 - January 2010
DESCRIPTION: Managed, provisioned, configured, built, and staged operational computer systems for the Navy/Marine Corps Intranet project.

SOURCE: 17111768.pdf
JOB TITLE: IT Specialist STEP (Student Technology Education Program)
COMPANY: DISA Naval Service Desk Support
DATES: March 2008 - August 2009
DESCRIPTION: Reported to the Lead Supervisor of DISA's Naval service desk support and independently managed data tape entry into appropriate storage drives.

SOURCE: 17111768.pdf
DEGREE: Master of Science in Organizational Development and Leadership (ODL)
INSTITUTION: Shippensburg University
DATES: 2015
